Package org.solenopsis.soap.tooling

Class CommunitiesSettings2

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.SObject
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.CommunitiesSettings2
public class CommunitiesSettings2 extends SObject

Java class for CommunitiesSettings complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="CommunitiesSettings">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:sobject.tooling.soap.sforce.com}sObject">
       <sequence>
         <element name="ApplyLoginPageTypeToEmbeddedLogin" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="BlockEmbeddedLoginUnknownUrlRedirect" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CanModerateAllFeedPosts" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CanModerateInternalFeedPosts" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="DurableId" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="EmbeddedVisualforcePages" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="FullName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsCommunityWorkspacesEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsCspContactVisibilityPrefEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsCspNotesOnAccConPrefEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsEnablePrmEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsExternalAccHierPrefEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsGuestPermDisOptOutCrucEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsGuestRecordReassignOrgPrefEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsGuestSecurityOptOutCrucEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsGuvSecurityOptOutPrefEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsInviteChatterGuestEnabledEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsNameFieldsUserPiiEnabledEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsNetPortalUserReportOptsEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsNetworksEnabledEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsOotbProfExtUserOpsEnableEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsPowerCustomerCaseStatusEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsPreventBadgeGuestAccessEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsPrmAccRelPrefEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsRelaxPartnerAccountFieldPrefEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsUnsupportedBrowserModalPrefEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsUsernameUniqForOrgPrefEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Metadata" type="{urn:metadata.tooling.soap.sforce.com}CommunitiesSettings" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
